productDisplayName: John Players Men Solid Blue Shirt
description: Style Note If you find your formal wear collection during the summer leaves you wanting for light yet bright shades, this blue shirt will take care of that requirement with ease. This light blue shirt will be the perfect formal complement to your dark trousers and formal shoes when you want a little colour in your regular formal wear without giving up on style and class. Product Details Light blue shirt with a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves, buttoned cuffs and a patch pocket on the left chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry flat in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit john players' contemporary fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
